THE COURT ISSUED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: CONSOLIDATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1048(A) IS ORDERED VACATED. THIS RULING BECOMES THE FINAL RULING AFTER 10 DAYS UNLESS THERE ARE ANY OBJECTIONS BROUGHT BEFORE THE COURT PRIOR TO SAID 10 DAYS.
